candidates.title: Distinguish gc-managed-layer (upgrade) from business-layer (sync) in wrap-up/sync skills
candidates.note: P-0095: promoted the CORRECTED kernel only. Submitter retracted the body's central claim in a follow-up comment (sync-repos IS the correct git-merge channel via MERGE_HEAD exemption + --no-verify; it does NOT destroy drift). Shipped a manifest-realignment note in commands/sync-repos.md + wrap-up.md Step 5b: after a /sync-repos merge that carried gc-managed files, run governance-core upgrade --project-root <clone> to realign the gitignored installed_files.json manifest, else next upgrade misclassifies merged files as drift (noise, not data loss). Did NOT ship the retracted false claims. v0.24.0; suite green + dogfood + wheel isolation OK. Issue #26.

De-trade-ified trade-side proposal refs to gc P-0097. v0.25.0; full suite green (42 guard + 28 pytest + 25 script); wheel isolation OK. Issue #85.
